summary: Backend-only testing of Factory/Enterprise V1 features. 9/10 tests passed, 1 skipped. All factory/enterprise validation, type defaults, parent_brand_name resolution, and upload-attachment endpoint working correctly.

minor.issue: Cloudinary rejects invalid PDF content with 'Invalid PDF file' error. Only valid PDFs and images are accepted.

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/brands with type='factory' and missing parent_brand_id returns 400
POST /api/admin/brands with type='factory' + valid parent_brand_id succeeds; GET /api/admin/brands includes parent_brand_name on the factory entry
POST /api/admin/brands without type field defaults to 'brand' (backward compat)
GET /api/admin/brands returns type + parent_brand_name fields correctly for all enterprises
POST /api/admin/brands with invalid type value (e.g. 'vendor') returns 400
POST /api/brand/upload-attachment with valid image returns {url, public_id, bytes, format}
POST /api/brand/upload-attachment with admin token (wrong tier) returns 401 'Invalid brand token'
POST /api/brand/orders by factory user: po_file_url, tech_pack_url, qty_color_matrix fields accepted in schema
POST /api/brand/orders persists enterprise_type correctly based on brand doc's type field (defaults to 'brand')
skipped_tests: test_upload_attachment_with_brand_token - Cloudinary rejected test PDF content as invalid
critical_code_review_comments: brand_router.py correctly validates factory type requires parent_brand_id (line 207-212)
brand_router.py correctly validates parent_brand_id refers to an active brand, not another factory (line 210)
list_brands endpoint correctly defaults legacy docs without type field to 'brand' (line 274)
list_brands endpoint correctly resolves parent_brand_name for factories (lines 269-276)
upload-attachment endpoint correctly validates brand token type (line 429)
BrandOrderCreate model correctly includes factory-only fields: po_file_url, tech_pack_url, qty_color_matrix (lines 706-708)
Order persistence correctly sets enterprise_type from brand.get('type', 'brand') (line 1160)
seed_data_creation: Created test factory enterprises during testing (cleaned up via soft-delete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Factory/Enterprise V1 features fully tested. Factory type enterprises require parent_brand_id pointing to an active brand. GET /api/admin/brands returns type and parent_brand_name fields. Upload-attachment endpoint works with valid images/PDFs via Cloudinary. Factory orders can include po_file_url, tech_pack_url, qty_color_matrix fields. Legacy orders have null enterprise_type but new orders will have correct value based on brand's type field.
